title: ASR Outdoor Precious Metal Testing Stone for Gold Panning
description:
The ASR Outdoor Testing Stone is an essential tool for gold panning. It will help you determine whether the metal you've found is precious or not! In addition to determining whether a metal is precious or not, this stone can also test for karat content. It is meant to be used with testing solution and needles (not included). The stone itself is 2" x 1.5" x .25", and is a necessary tool for jewelry makers and hobbyists as well. Make sure to add one of these to your gold rush kit or jewelry making tools!
